results.rendered_html:
ni-√1. kṛt P. Ā. -kṛntati, ˚te, to cut or hew down, cut away, cut or chop off, cut through or or to pieces, massacre,  KātyŚr. ;  MBh. ;  R. ;  Suśr.  &c.;
Ā. ˚te, (also) to cut one's self (or one's nails &c.),  TS. ;  ŚBr.  :
Caus. -kartayati, to cause to cut or cut down,  ŚāṅkhŚr.

nikṛt 6 P.
1 To cut down, cut to pieces, cut or tear off, tear up; viśvāsādbhayamutpannaṃ mūlānyapi nikṛṃtati  Pt. 2. 39 ; nikṛṃtanniva mānasaṃ  Bk. 7. 11 ; bhallanikṛttakaṃṭhaiḥ  R. 7. 58. 
2 To cut oneself (A.)
